chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1542 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 02-02-2021 Mr. Shahid Aziz Kaleri, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahryar Imdad Awan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Majid Ali Mako, Administrator / Assistant Commissioner, Ghotki is present, and has brought three original cheques in the name of Petitioner Muhammad Siddique. The details of cheques are as under: i) Cheque No.31301175 dated 08-12-2020 amounting to Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees on lac). ii) Cheque No.31816524 dated 01-02-2021 amounting to Rs.11,57,427/- (Rupees eleven lac fifty seven thousand four hundred twenty seven). iii) Cheque No.31816525 dated 01-02-2021 amounting Rs.4,20,602/- (Rupees Four lac twenty thousand six hundred two). The above cheques (in original) have been handed over to the Accountant of this Court, who is present in Court, with direction to transmit the same to the petitioner after proper identification, verification and obtaining receipt. The petition has served its purpose as the whole remaining amount has been paid to the petitioner, and the same is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
